subject: docs(conventions): clarify created/modified exclusion applies to AI output only
body:
Graphiki's own exports include created/modified timestamps to preserve
history on re-import. The "do not include" guidance targets AI-generated
JSON, not Graphiki export files. Added parenthetical note to both the
NODES and CONNECTIONS sections.

Tags: conventions, docs, export
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: import-export
